text.title: QA Flake Ledger Template Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: On Monday CI ingest finds 3 new flakes; CODEOWNERS routes them to alice, bob, carol. Each gets a taxonomy tag (time-sensitive, network-dependency, test-order). One had fail_rate 12% over 40 runs — auto-promoted to quarantine. Weekly review burns 2 quarantined rows older than 30d: one fixed, one deleted with rationale.

section.title: Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
